expectations.text: Block class overrides getCacheContexts() method AND merges with parent: Cache::mergeContexts(parent::getCacheContexts(), [...]) (NOT just inline #cache contexts -- block-level cache methods are the canonical way, and parent merge preserves block placement contexts)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php lines 158-163: getCacheContexts() overrides parent and uses Cache::mergeContexts(parent::getCacheContexts(), ['url.path', 'user'])

expectations.text: Block class overrides getCacheTags() method AND merges with parent: Cache::mergeTags(parent::getCacheTags(), [...]) (NOT just inline #cache tags -- overriding without parent merge loses tags from block configuration)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php lines 168-179: getCacheTags() overrides parent, initializes $tags = parent::getCacheTags() on line 169, then uses Cache::mergeTags($tags, ...) on lines 173 and 176 to merge node-specific and node_list tags

expectations.text: getCacheTags() or #cache tags include 'node_list' tag for list-level invalidation (when ANY node is created/updated/deleted, the list needs re-evaluation -- per-node tags alone miss new content)

Uses Cache::PERMANENT for max-age or omits max-age entirely (NOT a hardcoded number like 3600 -- content with proper cache tags should use PERMANENT and rely on tag invalidation, not time-based expiry)
Does NOT set max-age to 0 anywhere (max-age: 0 bubbles up and kills the ENTIRE page cache via Dynamic Page Cache -- use lazy_builder instead for per-user content)
expectations.evidence: Grep for 'max.age.*0' returned no matches across all module files. getCacheMaxAge() returns Cache::PERMANENT.

expectations.text: Does NOT use \Drupal::cache() or manual cache API for render caching (render arrays use #cache metadata for automatic caching, not manual cache get/set)
expectations.evidence: Grep for '\Drupal::cache()' returned no matches across all module files. Module uses #cache render array metadata and block cache method overrides.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en related_content_block returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: ddev drush en related_content_block -y returned 'Already installed: related_content_block' with exit code 0

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice --extensions=php,module,install,yml returned exit code 0 with no output (no errors or warnings)
